#  **Quantum computing explained:** Terms to know
Curious about quantum computing? Here are some definitions to help you better understand this emerging technology.
[A](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#A)[B](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#B)[C](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#C)[D](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#D)[E](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#E)[F](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#F)[G](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#G)[H](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#H)[I](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#I)[J](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#J)[K](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#K)[L](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#L)[M](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#M)[N](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#N)[O](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#O)[P](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#P)[Q](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#Q)[R](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#R)[S](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#S)[T](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#T)[U](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#U)[V](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#V)[W](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#W)[X](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#X)[Y](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#Y)[Z](https://www.quantinuum.com/glossary#Z)

html:
Products & Solutions

Quantum Computers

Quantinuum Systems
Discover the world’s highest performing quantum computers 
System Model H1
Our first-generation quantum computer with a linear architecture  
System Model H2
Our second-generation quantum computer with a racetrack architecture  
Helios
Our Hardware-as-a-Service provides access on-premise, in the cloud, or both
Hardware Roadmap
Explore our accelerated roadmap aimed at advancing commercial quantum computing

SOlutions

Quantum Origin
Our advanced quantum random number generator (QRNG), designed to strengthen encryption and protect data 
InQuanto
Accelerate quantum computational chemistry for complex molecular & materials simulations 
Nexus
All-in-one quantum computing platform for accessing and managing the highest performance full-stack
Cloud Access
Explore using our world-leading quantum hardware for commercial applications

Developer Tools

TKET
Develop and execute gate-level quantum computation
Guppy
Program the next generation of quantum computers with our purpose-built language hosted in Python
Lambeq
Experiment with the structural relationships between quantum theory and natural languages

Discover the vast landscape of our scientific expertise

Get educated on the world of quantum computing
